subcodes.first_line: O My two cherished friends! His Holiness Sina hath opened his tongue in praise of you, and the honourable Keeper of Records hath raised his melody [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو یار عزیز من حضرت سینا زبان بثنای شما گشوده و جناب سررشته دار بنغمه و
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude
